title: Convert to Base -2
hints: Think about how standard base conversion uses division and remainders. What happens when the remainder must be non-negative but the divisor is negative?
Use repeated division by -2. If the remainder is negative, adjust it to be positive by adding the base magnitude and incrementing the quotient.
This adjustment ensures digits are always 0 or 1. The process terminates when the quotient reaches zero, collecting digits in reverse order.
